name: rag
description: Builtin turnkey user RAG (ADR 0064 P5): chunker + vector-store MCP servers, ingest/query pipelines, and its RAG skill (routing/install, embedding-provider setup, the ingest/query workflow, and corpus internals, all bundled with references). External sqlite store the operator names and owns (FP-0057 C2) -- distinct from reyn's own semantic_search index.
